title: Harmonized Tariff Schedule - 2026
subtitle: CFR Title 19, Chapter IV
summary: The following table outlines the current tariff classifications and duty rates administered by the Authority for select chapters. These rates are effective as of January 1, 2026, unless otherwise noted.

sections.title: Available Download
sections.text: Download Full PDF Archive (15.2 MB) at /documents/tariff-schedule-2026.pdf
For official classification binding rulings, please consult the CBP Cross database or request an administrative ruling through the ATCA portal.
